# Support

## Where to get help

- Bug reports: https://github.com/ambicuity/sitesnap/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml
- Feature requests: https://github.com/ambicuity/sitesnap/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml
- Security/privacy reports: contact@riteshrana.engineer (private disclosure only)

## Response expectations

This repository is maintainer-led. Best-effort response target is 2-5 business days.

## Out of scope

- Public disclosure of security vulnerabilities
- Requests that require exposing private extension internals
- Unrelated support topics outside this repository
